# Jan Komínek — Senior Frontend / Fullstack Engineer

> Jan Komínek is a Senior Frontend and Fullstack Engineer based in Prague, Czech Republic. He specialises in Vue.js, React, TypeScript, and Node.js, and is available for flexible part-time B2B contracts (up to 10 hours/week). He is also pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Applied Computer Science at the Prague University of Economics and Business (VŠE).

## About

Jan has 3+ years of professional development experience across freelance and corporate environments. His core stack includes SvelteKit, Vue.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, AdonisJS, PostgreSQL, Docker, and Redis. He has led the development of EV charging platforms with integrated payment systems, built cloud-integrated enterprise security applications, and designed containerised infrastructure with Docker Swarm and microservices.

**Note on disambiguation:** Jan Komínek the engineer should not be confused with Jan Komínek the Czech actor. This site and all its content relate exclusively to software engineering work.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://jankominek.com/): Portfolio overview, availability status, and contact CTAs
- [Resume](https://jankominek.com/resume): Full work history, education, and technical skills
- [Contact](https://jankominek.com/contact): Inquiry form and calendar booking for project discussions
- [Blog](https://jankominek.com/blog): Technical articles on DevOps, web development, and infrastructure

## Featured projects

- [CORAC SITH — DeepTrace GUI](https://jankominek.com/projects/corac_sith?locale=en): Cybersecurity incident tracking and hash-chain visualisation application built for CORAC Engineering
- [CORAC Scorecard](https://jankominek.com/projects/corac_scorecard?locale=en): Data-driven scorecard and reporting dashboard for CORAC Engineering
- [IONT Charge App](https://jankominek.com/projects/iont_charge?locale=en): Public-facing EV charging application with integrated Stripe payment system
- [IONT Admin](https://jankominek.com/projects/iont_admin?locale=en): Admin platform for managing electric vehicle charging infrastructure
- [IONT Info](https://jankominek.com/projects/iont_info?locale=en): Mobile controller and info app for EV charging stations
- [Pangolin](https://jankominek.com/projects/pangolin?locale=en): Interactive dashboard for Pangolin Software s.r.o.
- [Noteful](https://jankominek.com/projects/noteful?locale=en): Personal design project — note-taking app concept
- [Disenchantment](https://jankominek.com/projects/disenchantment?locale=en): Open-source Minecraft plugin with 3K+ downloads

## Professional profiles

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jan-kominek)

## Technical expertise

TypeScript, Vue.js, React.js, SvelteKit, Node.js, AdonisJS, Express.js, Fastify, Nuxt.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, BullMQ, Docker, Docker Swarm, Kubernetes, Traefik, CI/CD, DigitalOcean, AWS, Cloudflare Workers, Figma, REST APIs, Microservices, Agile, System Architecture, Network Administration

## Availability

Open to part-time B2B contracts — up to 10 hours per week. Located in Prague, Czech Republic. Remote-friendly.
